name: HMS ML 149 (ML 149)
events: 8 May 1944 At 1000 B/8, HMS Unrivalled (Lt. D.S. Brown, RNVR) arrived at Heysham from Rothesay.
HMS Mistral (Lt. J.H.M. Sowry, RNVR) had parted company at 0736 B/8, when HMS ML 149 (T/Lt. W.H. Mitchell, RNVR) took over the escort.
At 1300 B/8, HMS Unrivalled departed Heysham for exercises with aircraft off Morecambe Bay. (1)
21 Aug 1944 HMS Varangian (Lt. A.J. Sumption, DSC, RNVR) departed Heysham for Rothesay. She was escorted by HMS ML 149 (T/Lt. W.H. Mitchell, RNVR). (2)
ADM numbers indicate documents at the British National Archives at Kew, London.
